title: Predicting a historic storm earlier with WeatherNext
summary: Google DeepMind's WeatherNext is an AI weather forecasting model that successfully predicted Hurricane Melissa's intensity and track in October 2025, providing advance notice to meteorologists and authorities for evacuation warnings. The model is being developed in collaboration with the National Hurricane Center to improve weather prediction and community resilience.
